description: It allows for faster and easier adoption and developing any solution. Easy to navigate and self learn platform, which makes any developer independent. High performance flexible & stabled platform.
author: Ruvesh V.
pros: Performance of data processing is fast as compared to other data ingestion & integration platforms. Stability and user intuitiveness helps the user develop and create. their data pipelines much faster. This increases the adoption of platform by any type of user The ease of moving the data pipelines to Spark based distribution engines or snowflake or bigquery is very flexible and requires no technical expertise and changes to move across runtime engines.
cons: Stability of certain services can be improved more. Since platform is microservices based it can have more integrated features related to AI driven functionalities like - predicting resource consumption, processing time of pipelines, detection of any network anomalies and responding to user. accordingly. this will increase more stability.

review_title: A great product to automize the MLOps journey
description: It has been a great journey so far, with so many added features & changes since i came accross this product, hoping to get better each day.
author: Ayush B.
pros: The wide range of templates to work on & scale the work seamlessly is one of the best thing about fosfor
cons: One thing that can be improved in the product is to add low cost version in the bucket to attract small startup/college users & indivisual users(B2C) who can directly login and do their work.
